feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, Kyma runtime
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, Kyma runtime Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Istio Configmap automatically change to default config after a certain time period
entry.content:
Hello,

while configuring an extension provider as part of a mesh config in Kyma, I encountered a problem with the configmap "istio" in the istio-system namespace (and the corresponding istio-operator "installed-state-default-operator") changing back their config to the default after a certain time.


What am I trying to configure? 

meshConfig:
  extensionProviders:
  - name: oauth2-proxy
    envoyExtAuthzHttp:
      service: oauth2-proxy.oauth2-proxy.svc.cluster.local
      port: 4180
      includeRequestHeadersInCheck:
      - cookie
      headersToUpstreamOnAllow:
      - authorization
      headersToDownstreamOnDeny:
      - set-cookie

Expected behaviour:
Changes stay valid

Actual behaviour:
Configmap and operator change to original config, resulting in an "rbac: access denied" error when trying to authenticate via oauth2-proxy.

I would appreciate if someone could point me to the resource that has to be changed in order for my changes to stay valid.

Thank you.

PS: I have checked to cluster for any scheduling tasks or cron-jobs but didn't find anything.

entry.title: Which type of service can I connect for On-Premise to Cloud on SAP Cloud Connector?
entry.content: I have read some documents about the Connectivity of SAP BTP, it usually shows that On-Premise to Cloud is a connection that connects Apps, DB Tools, Dev Tools and Replication Tools to SAP HANA Cloud. I'd want to ask, "Aside from SAP HANA Cloud, are there any other services to which the On-Premise can connect?"

entry.title: insufficient privilege - while grant
entry.content:
I am new to SAP BTP.

I have created one user provided service instance.

getting this error insufficient privilege: Detailed info for this error can be found with guide '18D2CF9536D5D64998CFD68E7D65BECA'

entry.title: SAP CAP : Mocking External OData service with Local CSV Data
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a CAP Project, which uses an External OData service(S4 On-premise) to fetch some data.

Now we have got a scenario to automate the Testing using "jest".

We would like to setup a Local mock data for external service entities, But we cannot able to deploy the mock data from "srv/external/data/EXT_MM_API_PRODUCT-A_Product.csv"

Followed below guide, but cant able to see "EXT_MM_API_PRODUCT-A_Product.csv", deployed when we try to run the mock sever locally.

https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-developer-guide-cap/blob/b5960ea2c03b3cc0d7c2b0085126d043451eed44/documentation/remote-service/develop/test-with-mock.md

As per suggestion from the guide, tried removing the ".cds-services.json"file. But did not help.

"If the API_BUSINESS_PARTNER doesn't show up, remove the .cds-services.json file - you find it in the user root folder (e.g.: /home/user/.cds-services.json)".

Any help or direction will be helpfull, Thanks in Advance.

Regards

Naveen

entry.title: How to bind hmlt5 application and service xsuaa in scope Kyma
entry.content:
I'm not going to dwell on archive content.
the scenario is as follows:
There is an xsuaa service created via KYMA and there is a sapui5 application and its deployment should be done via the command line.

command

cf deploy

When deploying via the command line it does not find the xsuaa service because they are in different scopes

How could the xsuaa service existing in kyma be referenced in mta.yaml so that it finds it?

entry.title: Any other feature import IDOC Structure in CPI Otherthan as an XSD in message mapping
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Do we have any other feature that is available in CPI to import IDOC, We can import IDOC as an XSD in message mapping but any other option that is available .

Any new feature has come up?

I am new to CPI please suggest.

 

Thanks,

Satya

entry.title: CAP or RAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,


I'm a SAP ABAP developer, I well trained in SAP UI5, OData and ABAP. For my future career opportunities what should I choose CAP or RAP which is going to be enlarged in future business perceptions. 

Need your advice. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How can I send payload as an attachment through ANS Email Alert?
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently we are ANS for exception email alerts, so we have a requirement to send payload as an attachment via ANS email alert with the body what we are currently sending. Can I send attachment ANS? Any suggestions

Thanks in Advance.

Thanks & Regards

Venkat

entry.title: UDP on Kyma Environment
entry.content:
Is it possible to route UDP datagrams into a kubernetes kluster runnig Kyma?

I have tried a variety of different approaches to deploy a UDP server on the BTP, but haven't found a valid solution.

Here is a yaml file that roughly shows what I was trying to do:

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: udp-test-server
  labels:
    app: udp-test-server-pod
spec:
  containers:
  - name: udp-test-server
    image: aarondiel/udp-echo-server
    ports:
    - containerPort: 2004
      protocol: UDP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: udp-test-server-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: udp-test-server-pod
  ports:
  - port: 2004
    targetPort: 2004
    protocol: UDP
---
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: udp-test-server-gateway
spec:
  gatewayClassName: istio
  listeners:
  - name: udp-gateway
    port: 2004
    protocol: UDP
---
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1alpha2
kind: UDPRoute
metadata:
  name: udp-test-server-route
spec:
  parentRefs:
  - name: udp-gateway
    kind: Gateway
  rules:
  - backendRefs:
    - name: udp-test-server-service
      port: 2004

 Kyma is fine with me deploying the pod and the service, but getting access to this proofs to be difficult for UDP

Here are some of the different approaches I have tried:

  • NodePort: Limits the available ports to the range 30000-32767; additionally I don't think you can directly access nodes within a cluster, which means this does not work.
  • LoadBalancer: This should in theory create a external IP / domain, but it throws an error stating that UDP is not supported for the service type LoadBalancer.
  • APIRule: From what I read in the documentation this is just a wrapper around the Istio Gateway API and only supports HTTP.
  • Ingress: Only supports HTTP
  • Gateway API: This is what is still visible in the example above. The Gateway API is still somewhat experimental and the UDPRoute that I created above is deployed as a TCP LoadBalancer.

I am guessing that because a lot of the routing logic is handled by Istio, which does not support UDP (https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/1430), Kyma in turn also does not support UDP.

Tl;dr - Is UDP supported for Kyma, or has anyone managed to deploy a application using UDP to the BTP?

entry.title: I would like to ask for assistance with regarding the suggested solutions for the following four
entry.content:
Help! Could  please assist with providing specific solutions to these four issues?
Needs explanation

entry.title: How to assign a role pragmatically to a user in SAP BTP using SAP CAP?

entry.title: Not Able to open Account explorer
entry.content:
Hello All,

Not able to open my sub-account getting message 

"

Sorry, we're currently unable to access this subaccount. Please try again later. If the issue persists, contact support for assistance.
"
Where to reach for support?
 
Regards,
Ummar Rasheed

entry.title: Webhook for SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts;
I want to use Webhook with SAP integration suite for event driven iflows architecture. I foud this blog but it's not detailed and I'm new to SAP CPI. Any help please 🙂
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-em-webhook-mechanism-sap-cpi/ba-p/13450415.
I have an SAP BTP Trial account and I want to trigger insertion events in my iflow through webhook.

entry.title: Multiple Table header rows in sapUi5
entry.content:
The uploaded image shows a table with two header rows. The header rows are grouped and placed under another header row. How can I achieve the same in SAPUI5?

SAPUI5

entry.title: Unable to consume messages in S/4 Hana system that are published in Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hi there,

we have created a event consumption Model as suggested in below blog till step 8.

Event Processing in an SAP S/4HANA on-premise system | SAP Tutorials

We want consume the message that is published  in Event mesh queue. Kindly help.

entry.title: Unit link content in "Side-by-Side Extensibility Based on SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime" broken
entry.content:
Hello,

I am doing the learning journey "Side-by-Side Extensibility Based on SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime". In the Unit 5, "Using Service Meshes with Istio", the link for the content "Using Istio" is broken, Could you fix it or help me?

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/deliver-side-by-side-extensibility-based-on-sap-btp-kyma-runtime/using-istio_e6d12146-f641-4184-9045-c6ccf5ea4344

Thanks.

Best regards.

entry.title: Beas in Item Structure
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone help me on . What are the table Beas apply in Item Structure multi level BOM (Sub level Bom). How to do in sql level1, level2, level3 and level 4.I need output exactly same as item structure. Kindly help me the issue.

Thanks. 

Regards,

Seetha

entry.title: Kyma Subscription Eventing issue for Cx Enhancment
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are trying to use the KYMA Functions to Extend a Sales Cloud/C4C object.

Steps done in BTP Global Account:

1. Enabled Kyma and ran a simple serverless hello world function

2. Added C4C System in Landscape.

3.Created Formation for that system.

4. Fetched the Token from the same to be used in Even notification in C4C System.

Steps done in C4C :

1. Created an Even notification on a BO Root Create and used Token derived from step 4 above.

Steps done in KYMA:

1. Once I done above steps i can see my C4C tenant as application in Kyma.

2. Created a simple Function.

3. Added a Subscription to that Function.

 

Error : 404 from C4C whenever the Event is getting triggered, what am i missing?

entry.title: 404 error while calling SAP Build Work Zone(Launchpad) Notification API in BAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am calling Notification api using ajax call in SAPUI5 BAS to push notification to SAP build work zone(Launchpad site) but I am getting 404 error in the network. Even I am getting same error after deploying the app to cloud foundary.

I have done steps below.

1. Created destination in BTP

2. Configured route in xs-app.json

Do I need to upadate something in mta.yaml to work?

Code in SAPUI5 - 

var appId = this.getOwnerComponent().getManifestEntry("/sap.app/id");
var appPath = appId.replaceAll(".", "/");
var appModulePath = jQuery.sap.getModulePath(appPath);
var xsrfUrl =  appModulePath + "/Notify/v2/Notification.svc/Notifications";
 $.ajax({
                    url: xsrfUrl,
                    headers: {
                        "X-CSRF-Token": "fetch"
                    },
                    async: false,
                    type: "GET",
                    success: function (oData, status, xhr) {
                    },
                    error: function (oError) {
                    }
                });
I want to fetch token from this URL to do post call for a notification.

Can you please give me solution/suggestions?

Thanks in advance!

Note: The same url is working in Postman. I am able to push notifications to launchpad

Best Regards,

Vikas Kumar

SAPUI5  SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  SAP Fiori Launchpad OData  @sapsupportdig @BTPDev @SAPSupport 

Destination in BTP

Route in xs-app.json

Error

entry.title: How to get all logs or list of all events triggered to my Kyma Function?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to debug/check all the functions being called now we know we have the logs available on function/pods but we are not seeing any Logs there but from C4C I can see the call was made successfull.

But i am not able to see which function is being triggered, in Kyma console do we have any place where we can see all recieved messages/events/ etc?

BR

Dhruvin
